title: Kibbeh (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Mix bulgur with meat and spices.
Make filling with meat, onions, nuts.
Bake in the oven until cooked through.

source_review.text: Perfect kibbeh! Added a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of sumac. Also added a dash of allspice and a sprinkle of fresh mint.

modifications_applied.reasoning: The user added extra flavors to enhance the dish.

source_review.text: Baked instead of fried for a lighter version. Added extra pine nuts and a pinch of cumin. Served with tahini sauce.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Baking instead of frying reduces the amount of oil used and creates a lighter dish.

changes_made.to_text: Bake in the oven until cooked through.

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: The user added extra flavors to enhance the dish.; Baking instead of frying reduces the amount of oil used and creates a lighter dish.
